title: A Spectral Sequence for Cohomotopy
abstract: For a prime number p let  be the class of finite abelian groups whose orders are prime to p. For a finitely generated abelian group G, let Gp be the sum of the free and p-primary components of G. Our aim in this paper is to prove the following theorem.Theorem.
